title: Codebase Documentation & Summarization Pipeline
description: A comprehensive, multi-stage CI/CD workflow designed to automate the generation of structured documentation and metadata from disparate codebases. The system operates by syncing projects, triggering LLM-powered analysis (via Ollama) when metadata is incomplete. Core modules include recursive file scanning, codebase summarization, and centralized data aggregation. The entire flow culminates in populating a master 'work-data.json' manifest, providing a complete inventory of analyzed projects.
